{{CargoOrgan
|name=Einstein's Left Brain
|type=Common
|rank=purple
|id=10855
|idx=60
|description=A biological marvel capable of phenomenal cognition and logic—able to tackle intricate mathematical and physical problems and formulate groundbreaking scientific theories.
|skill=
|hp=1476
|def=184
|atk=150
|rush=149
|gene1=Free Gene Speedup (Zombie) +30m
|gene2=Free Gene Speedup (Demon) +30m
|gene3=Free Gene Speedup (Mutant) +30m
|gene4=Free Gene Speedup (Dragon) +30m
|gene7=Gene Research Free Speedup +30m (Awakened)
|}}
